subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth for a people who know, and it guideth mankind unto the path of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لقوم یعرفون و یهدی الناس الی صراط الله المهیمن القیوم طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
